channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — June 27, 2026
item.description: If you accept the remedy for a thought disorder, and a remedy whose efficacy is beyond doubt, how can its symptoms remain? You have reason to question the validity of symptom cure, but NO-ONE believes that the symptoms can remain if the underlying CAUSE is removed. The CONTINUING will to remain separated is the only possible reason for continuing guilt feelings.We have said this before, but we did

item.title: Lesson 62: “Forgiveness is my function as the light of the world.”
item.description: “Forgiveness is my function as the light of the world.” It is your forgiveness that will bring the world of darkness to the light. It is your forgiveness that lets you recognize the light in which you see. Forgiveness is the demonstration that you are the light of the world.Through your forgiveness does the truth about yourself return to your memory.Therefore in your forgiveness lies your salvatio
